title: rubus fruticosus subsp. fastigiatus
intro: Rubus fruticosus subsp. fastigiatus, also known as the upright blackberry or thimbleberry, is a subspecies of the blackberry plant (Rubus fruticosus) that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus fruticosus subsp. fastigiatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
